title: Install Book Environment Dependencies
description: An interactive dependency graph visualization showing all software components required to set up an intelligent textbook development environment using MkDocs Material and Claude Skills.
creator: Claude AI
subject: Software Installation, Dependency Management, Development Environment

controls.navigation: Built-in vis-network navigation buttons for zoom and pan
controls.hover: Hover over nodes to see component descriptions
controls.select: Click nodes to highlight connected dependencies

learningObjectives: Interpret a DEPENDS_ON dependency graph in which arrows point from a component to what it requires, and read it right to left to find installation order

Identify the seven layers of the environment: permissions, Unix shell and file system, Python and Node.js and Git runtimes, pip and npm package managers, MkDocs Python packages, Claude tools, and the Build Book goal
Trace backwards from the Build Book node to enumerate every component that must be installed first
Explain why pip installs mkdocs, mkdocs-material, and pymdown-extensions while npm installs Claude Code, and what each package manager requires of its runtime
Predict which downstream components break when a prerequisite such as Python 3.10 or Git is missing
